scripts.db:shell: docker exec -it docx-corpus-postgres-1 psql -U postgres -d docx_corpus
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/scraper typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/extractor typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/cli typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/scraper test && bun run --cwd apps/cli test
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/scraper build && bun run --cwd apps/cli build
